name: better-github-pr-view
description: Release tooling and store metadata for Better GitHub PR View.

scripts.build: bun run build:chrome && bun run build:firefox
scripts.pack: bun run pack:chrome && bun run pack:firefox
scripts.pack:chrome: bun run build:chrome && bun run scripts/pack.ts chrome
scripts.pack:firefox: bun run build:firefox && bun run scripts/pack.ts firefox
scripts.lint:firefox: bun run build:firefox && web-ext lint -s dist/firefox
scripts.check:release: bun run typecheck && bun run build:chrome && bun run build:firefox && bun run lint:firefox && bun run scripts/check-release.ts && bun run pack:chrome && bun run pack:firefox
